target: 8. Kaori's Request
July 23rd
Shinpei Ajiro

(That smartphone from yesterday…
What was the result of the recording?)

(Please… if possible,
don't let anything show up…)

Damn it…
It's perfectly clear…
That fake video…

(…If it was recorded,
I can't just ignore it now)
Mio, take a look at this for a second.
A smartphone? What's going on?
It's a video I took last night.
Last night? What did you film?
You'll understand when you watch it.
W-what is this…?

Eh… who is this…!?
W-who is this!?

You're lying about it being last night, right?
Because I wasn't outside in my uniform last night.

It really was last night.
But the person in the video isn't Mio.

At that time,
you were taking a bath, right?
Then… what is this…?
Hey… have you heard of the Shadow Sickness?
The Shadow Sickness? So this is it!?

Honestly… it seems ridiculous.
But once you see it…
See what?
I saw the Shadow… copying a person.
Copying…?

Ah.
It was copying… 
I saw the Shadow turning into a human form.

Mio!!
Stay away from me for a while!
Eh!?
I don't know what kind of people the Shadows are.

But since they disguise themselves and attack in plain sight,
they probably won't attack in crowded places.

Being alone is too dangerous.
Let's stick together for a while.
U-uh, okay. I'll do as you say.
Yeah, do that.

Shinpei's phone is ringing.
Is it a call?
Ah, it's probably from Kaori.
I'll take it for a moment.
Mmm…
What's with that look?

Aren't you the one who told me not to leave?
Not Shinpei?

I'm just going to my room to talk.
I won't be going out.
Well, it's fine by me…
Hello?

O-oh, good morning, Shinpei-kun, this is Kaori.
Are you okay right now?

Ah, I'm fine.
I'm sorry for calling you yesterday when you were busy.

No, it's fine.
I-I'm so happy to be talking to Shinpei-kun…
Huh?
U-uh, u-uh, uhh…
H-hey, Kaori, what's wrong?
It's nothing…

S-so?
Do you need something?
Yeah, I wanted to talk about something.
A talk? What is it?

There's a segment in tomorrow's talk show
about the famous spots on Hitogashima Island…

I thought I'd like to take a leisurely walk
around the island to get a better feel for it.
But to do that, I need to go outside…
I'd rather you not go out alone…
So… if possible, could I ask you to be my guide?

So it's like showing around the famous spots
and giving a brief explanation?
Just a quick explanation would be fine…
Wouldn't it be better to ask someone from the Chamber of Commerce?

I'd like to interview the islanders themselves
about the spots they consider famous.

In that case, I think it would be easier for the islanders
to talk if you're there, Shinpei-kun, since you're one of them.
Hm, I guess that's true…
Is it not okay?
No, it's not like I'm absolutely against it…

(What should I do?
I was planning to go to Asako-san's house
to check things out…)
U-um… actually, they've already come to pick me up.
Eh…!?
(They came to pick me up… could it be they're already nearby!?)
Y-yeah, I'm here…
You really are here…

Kaori-chan,
did you come to see Shinpei-kun?
M-Mio, when did you get here!?
T-that's right, don't just barge into someone's room.
I just happened to pass by.

You don't just happen to pass by
in someone's room, do you?

I don't care anymore.
Anyway, Kaori-chan, what's the reason you came here?

Ah, she's asking me to show her around the island
for the talk show.

You're doing that too?
Being an idol is tough, isn't it?

(She was once killed by a Shadow.
Even though she survived yesterday,
I can't be sure it's safe.)
That's why I was planning to show Kaori around the island…
Will you come with us, Mio?
Eh, can I come too?

Didn't I just say
we should stick together for a while?
Oh, right.

Then I'll get ready!
Wait for me a bit!
Try to hurry.
Yessir!
